steps.title: Find the slope a using two points
steps.content:
Using points $(1, -64)$ and $(2, 0)$ from the table:
$$a = \frac{f(2) - f(1)}{2 - 1} = \frac{0 - (-64)}{1} = 64$$

steps.title: Find b and calculate a - b
steps.content:
Using the point $(1, -64)$ with $f(1) = a(1) + b$:
$$64 + b = -64$$
$$b = -128$$
Therefore:
$$a - b = 64 - (-128) = 192$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
